questions.question: Explain the difference between global navigation and local navigation with examples.
expectedPoints: Global navigation appears across all pages (e.g., main menu)
Local navigation is specific to a section (e.g., submenu)
Global provides access to top-level categories
Local provides access within a category

questions.question: Describe the navigation design process from research to implementation, including key considerations at each stage.
expectedPoints: Research phase: user goals, content analysis, competitor review
Structural design: hierarchy definition, grouping, flow diagrams
